title: 30cm Battery Operated Water Spinner Tree With Timer And Colour Changing LED's
features: Simply flick the switch on the base of this tree and a small fan in the base circulates the water inside, dispersing glitter throughout the tree to create a shimmering effect.
Measures 32cm in height and 12cm at the base.
description: Product description Simply flick the switch on the base of this tree and a small fan in the base circulates the water inside, dispersing glitter throughout the tree to create a shimmering effect. Automatic 5hrs on / 19hrs off timer. Measures 32cm in height and 12cm at the base. Requires 4 x AA Batteries (not included). Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use.
